mnemonics: Supervised Learners Always Verify (SLAV) - Supervised, Learning, Algorithms, Validation
CRoss-Validation Prevents Overfitting (CROPO) - Cross-validation, Regularization, Overfitting, Parameters, Optimization
keyPoints: Understand the bias-variance tradeoff and how it relates to model complexity.
Be able to explain and implement k-fold cross-validation.
Know the difference between precision, recall, F1-score, and accuracy for classification evaluation.
commonMistakes: Confusing classification accuracy with precision or recall, especially for imbalanced datasets.
Using the entire dataset for both training and validation, leading to overfitting.
Forgetting to normalize or standardize data before using algorithms sensitive to feature scaling, like SVM or K-NN.
